title: Bomb add on
description: Explosives, radioactive blocks, nuclear tools & survival challenges. Build, destroy, and survive the chaos.
body:
### **Bomb Addons**


Introduction

Bomb Addons is a nuclear-themed expansion mod for Minecraft that introduces a dangerous yet thrilling blend of explosives, radioactive blocks, nuclear resources, protective gear, and powerful tools. Designed for players who want to push the boundaries of survival, engineering, and chaos, this mod redefines how you interact with your world. Whether you are a builder experimenting with toxic blocks, a redstone engineer looking for new TNT mechanics, or a survivor navigating radiation-filled landscapes, Bomb Addons provides you with a rich, immersive, and risky gameplay experience.

🧨 Features

🔸 Advanced Explosives & TNT Variants

Satanbomba and Tntgreen – devastating TNT variations with unique explosive effects.

TNTwhite – a new TNT block designed for tactical use.

Custom Redstone Triggers & Procedures (e.g., TNTwhiteRedstone, TNTSouffle) – allowing players to build more sophisticated explosive contraptions than ever before.

Redstone engineers can now combine logic, traps, and nuclear TNT to unleash chaos
in controlled or uncontrolled ways.

🔸 Radioactivity & Contamination

Radioactive Fluid – a spreading liquid hazard that contaminates everything it touches.

Radioactive Block Set (Leaves, Planks, Stairs, Slabs, Fences, Buttons, and more) – a complete building palette infused with toxic energy, perfect for constructing a radioactive wasteland or deadly traps.

Radioactive Biome (Videnucleaire) – a hostile environment that forces players to rethink exploration and survival strategies.

🔸 Nuclear Resources 
Nuclear Ore – a new resource that can be mined, processed, and refined.

Nuclear Blocks – storage solutions for nuclear materials.

Smelted Nuclear Variants – progression items that form the backbone of nuclear crafting.

Raw Nuclear Item – a dangerous consumable/usable item that comes with consequences if handled carelessly.

🔸 Protective Gear

Full Nuclear Suit (Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots) – essential equipment to survive radiation zones and safely handle nuclear resources. Without it, exposure becomes lethal over time.

🔸 Nuclear Tools & Weapons

Nuclear Pickaxe, Sword, Axe, Shovel, Hoe – highly durable and more efficient than their vanilla counterparts. These tools are designed for late-game players seeking both raw power and survival in contaminated regions.

🔥 Why Choose Bomb Addons?

Expanded Building Options – radioactive blocks provide unique aesthetics for builders who want futuristic, apocalyptic, or industrial themes.

More Powerful Explosives – new TNT mechanics add variety, strategy, and destructive fun.

Survival Challenge – the introduction of radiation creates real danger, forcing players to prepare with protective gear before venturing into contaminated areas.

Resource Progression – mining, refining, and crafting nuclear materials creates a rewarding progression path.

Unique Biome Exploration – explore the Videnucleaire biome, a deadly yet resource-rich area that changes how you approach exploration.

Tools & Gear Upgrade – nuclear-powered tools and armor give late-game players a sense of technological advancement beyond vanilla Minecraft.

⚡ In Summary

Bomb Addons is not just another “TNT mod.” It is a complete nuclear survival and chaos experience that transforms Minecraft into a hazardous, yet exciting, post-apocalyptic playground. By combining new explosives, radioactive blocks, nuclear ores, protective suits, and advanced tools, it offers a perfect balance between creativity, survival strategy, and sheer destructive fun.

Whether you want to:

Build a radioactive wasteland,
Engineer sophisticated redstone-powered bombs,
Or challenge yourself to survive in a world poisoned by radiation...
👉 Bomb Addons gives you the tools to do it.
